long_description:
[TEL] NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar down is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel_host_qradar_agent_troubleshooting.html
TIP Short Description: ca-mon-prod01-zone2-edge NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar is down on host mon2-qz1-sr2-rk091-s30 for the past hour
TIP Situation: NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar down
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::ca-mon-prod01-zone2-edge:host:mon2-qz1-sr2-rk091-s30

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    min by (host_hostname, agent_tag_cluster) ( sysdig_program_up{program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/qradar/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster!=""} or present_over_time(sysdig_program_up{program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/qradar/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster!=""}[7d]) * 0 ) == 0 = 0
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'ca-mon-prod01-zone2-edge' and host_hostname = 'mon2-qz1-sr2-rk091-s30'

Time:             12/02/2025 07:00 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/675be9de-53de-4e9b-b61e-5e297333a334?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F43887769%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [TEL] NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar down
Description:  NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar process is down on the reported host. This alert's definition needs to be different from the norm. When a process stops running on a machine, data disappears in Sysdig. So special multiplication is needed so that we have zero values available in the 'no data' gaps. Also, we are using a 7d interval in the condition to provide us with zeros instead of 'no data' for an extended period of time to keep Sysdig from auto-resolving the alert and to keep the SNOW incident open long enough for our team to deal with the problem.
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   min by (host_hostname, agent_tag_cluster) ( sysdig_program_up{program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/qradar/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster!=""} or present_over_time(sysdig_program_up{program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/qradar/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster!=""}[7d]) * 0 ) == 0
Duration: 1 h
Alert URL:    https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/675be9de-53de-4e9b-b61e-5e297333a334?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D535975
